body.title: Workflow: add consequence-check gating to design closure
body.result: skills/sorted/SKILL.md Step 5.5 MANDATORY for M/L/XL; design closure gate added to invariants + hard rules; skills/audit-ticket/SKILL.md Check 19 fires AMEND when M/L/XL decision has no consequence ticket; synced to ~/.claude/skills/
body.intention: I intend that design status cannot move to 'closed' until a consequence-check ticket is filed and closed, enforced by a ticket-audit check.
body.description:
**Root cause:** When implementation tickets close, there is no gate requiring verification of intended behavior. Designs can accumulate with status=open indefinitely while all impl work is done.

**Design:** Add a /audit-ticket check (or @audit-design logic) that flags design-spawning decisions:
- If decision_id is set on a ticket AND that decision exists in palace
- AND the decision status is 'open'
- AND all sibling tickets (same decision_id) show status=closed
- THEN: decision cannot move to 'closed' until a consequence-check ticket (T-consequence-{slug}) is filed AND that consequence ticket is also closed

Alternatively: /sorted step 5.5 (consequence-check ticket drafting) should be MANDATORY for M+/XL designs, not optional.

Behavior: When a developer tries to close a design without a filed+closed consequence ticket, the audit returns AMEND with message 'Decision D-xxx has all impl closed but no verified consequences — file T-consequence-{slug} and close it before closing the design.'

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/audit_ticket.py (add check); lab/skills/sorted/SKILL.md (make Step 5.5 mandatory for M+ designs)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: gate logic, audit check, /sorted guidance update. OUT: backfill audit of existing open designs (see T-gap-scan-consequence-debt).
**Completion criteria:** Attempting to close a design D-xxx via `/sorted close D-xxx` fails with AMEND if consequence ticket is not filed+closed. /audit-ticket flags unverified designs at filing time. /sorted Step 5.5 is marked MANDATORY (not optional) for M/L/XL decisions.
**Test plan:** File a test design T-test-gate-check with one S impl ticket. Close impl ticket. Try to close the design — should be blocked. File T-consequence-test-gate-check, close it. Try to close design again — should succeed. Delete test design and consequence ticket after verification.
